tEn: Efficiently Modeling Long Sequences with Structured State Spaces
tZh: 使用结构化状态空间高效建模长序列
sEn: S4 model achieves strong results on long-range sequence tasks, including solving Path-X of length 16k, while being efficient.
sZh: S4模型在长序列任务上取得强结果，包括解决长度16k的Path-X任务，同时保持高效。
absEn: A central goal of sequence modeling is designing a single principled model that can address sequence data across a range of modalities and tasks, particularly on long-range dependencies. Although conventional models including RNNs, CNNs, and Transformers have specialized variants for capturing long dependencies, they still struggle to scale to very long sequences of $10000$ or more steps. A promising recent approach proposed modeling sequences by simulating the fundamental state space model (SSM) \( x'(t) = Ax(t) + Bu(t), y(t) = Cx(t) + Du(t) \), and showed that for appropriate choices of the state matrix \( A \), this system could handle long-range dependencies mathematically and empirically. However, this method has prohibitive computation and memory requirements, rendering it infeasible as a general sequence modeling solution. We propose the Structured State Space sequence model (S4) based on a new parameterization for the SSM, and show that it can be computed much more efficiently than prior approaches while preserving their theoretical strengths. Our technique involves conditioning \( A \) with a low-rank correction, allowing it to be diagonalized stably and reducing the SSM to the well-studied computation of a Cauchy kernel. S4 achieves strong empirical results across a diverse range of established benchmarks, including (i) 91\% accuracy on sequential CIFAR-10 with no data augmentation or auxiliary losses, on par with a larger 2-D ResNet, (ii) substantially closing the gap to Transformers on image and language modeling tasks, while performing generation $60\times$ faster (iii) SoTA on every task from the Long Range Arena benchmark, including solving the challenging Path-X task of length 16k that all prior work fails on, while being as efficient as all competitors.
absZh: 序列建模的一个核心目标是设计一个统一的原则性模型，能够处理跨多种模态和任务的序列数据，特别是长程依赖。尽管包括RNN、CNN和Transformer在内的传统模型有专门捕捉长依赖的变体，但它们仍然难以扩展到10000步或更长的序列。最近一种有前景的方法通过模拟基本状态空间模型（SSM）\( x'(t) = Ax(t) + Bu(t), y(t) = Cx(t) + Du(t) \) 来建模序列，并表明对于状态矩阵\( A \)的适当选择，该系统可以在数学上和经验上处理长程依赖。然而，该方法具有高昂的计算和内存需求，使其无法作为通用的序列建模解决方案。我们提出了结构化状态空间序列模型（S4），基于SSM的一种新参数化，并表明它可以在保留先前方法理论优势的同时，计算效率更高。我们的技术涉及对\( A \)进行低秩修正，使其能够稳定对角化，并将SSM简化为经过充分研究的柯西核计算。S4在多种既定基准上取得了强大的实证结果，包括：(i) 在顺序CIFAR-10上达到91%的准确率，无需数据增强或辅助损失，与更大的2D ResNet相当；(ii) 在图像和语言建模任务上大幅缩小与Transformer的差距，同时生成速度快60倍；(iii) 在Long Range Arena基准的每个任务上达到最先进水平，包括解决所有先前工作失败的长度16k的Path-X任务，同时与所有竞争对手一样高效。

contrib.en: Proposes S4, a structured state space model for efficient long-range sequence modeling.
contrib.zh: 提出S4，一种用于高效长程序列建模的结构化状态空间模型。

contrib.en: Introduces NPLR parameterization enabling stable diagonalization and O(N+L) computation.
contrib.zh: 引入NPLR参数化，实现稳定对角化和O(N+L)计算。

contrib.en: Reduces SSM convolution kernel computation to Cauchy kernel, enabling fast algorithms.
contrib.zh: 将SSM卷积核计算简化为柯西核，支持快速算法。

contrib.en: Achieves 91% accuracy on sequential CIFAR-10 without data augmentation, matching ResNet.
contrib.zh: 在序列CIFAR-10上无需数据增强达到91%准确率，媲美ResNet。

contrib.en: Solves Path-X task of length 16K, where all prior models fail, with 88% accuracy.
contrib.zh: 解决长度为16K的Path-X任务，准确率88%，此前所有模型均失败。

contrib.en: Sets state-of-the-art on Long Range Arena benchmark, outperforming Transformers by 20+ points.
contrib.zh: 在Long Range Arena基准上达到最优，超越Transformer 20多个百分点。

limits.en: S4 is primarily evaluated on 1-D sequence tasks; extension to 2-D data is limited.
limits.zh: S4主要在1-D序列任务上评估，扩展到2-D数据有限。

limits.en: The NPLR parameterization is specific to HiPPO matrices; general SSMs may not benefit.
limits.zh: NPLR参数化特定于HiPPO矩阵，通用SSM可能无法受益。

limits.en: S4's performance on very large-scale language models is not fully explored.
limits.zh: S4在超大规模语言模型上的性能尚未充分探索。

limits.en: The model assumes linear time-invariance, limiting adaptability to non-stationary signals.
limits.zh: 模型假设线性时不变性，限制了适应非平稳信号的能力。

limits.en: Numerical stability issues may arise with eigenvalues on the right half-plane, requiring fixes.
limits.zh: 右半平面特征值可能导致数值不稳定，需要修正。

items.zh: 序列建模的一个核心目标是设计一个单一的原则性模型，能够处理跨多种模态和任务的序列数据，特别是长程依赖。尽管包括RNN、CNN和Transformer在内的传统模型有专门处理长程依赖的变体，但它们仍然难以扩展到10000步或更长的序列。最近一种有前景的方法提出通过模拟基本状态空间模型（SSM）x′(t)=Ax(t)+Bu(t), y(t)=Cx(t)+Du(t)来建模序列，并表明对于状态矩阵A的适当选择，该系统可以在数学和实验上处理长程依赖。然而，该方法具有高昂的计算和内存需求，使其无法作为通用的序列建模解决方案。我们提出了基于SSM新参数化的结构化状态空间序列模型（S4），并表明它可以在保留先前方法理论优势的同时，计算效率远高于先前方法。我们的技术涉及用低秩校正来调节A，使其能够稳定对角化，并将SSM简化为经过充分研究的柯西核计算。S4在多个既定基准上取得了强劲的实验结果，包括：(i) 在顺序CIFAR-10上达到91%的准确率，无需数据增强或辅助损失，与更大的2D ResNet相当；(ii) 在图像和语言建模任务上大幅缩小了与Transformer的差距，同时生成速度快60倍；(iii) 在Long Range Arena基准的每个任务上达到最先进水平，包括解决了所有先前工作都失败的、长度为16k的具有挑战性的Path-X任务，同时效率与所有竞争对手相当。

items.en: A central problem in sequence modeling is efficiently handling data that contains long-range dependencies (LRDs). Real-world time-series data often requires reasoning over tens of thousands of time steps, while few sequence models address even thousands of time steps. For instance, results from the long-range arena (LRA) benchmark [40] highlight that sequence models today perform poorly on LRD tasks, including one (Path-X) where no model performs better than random guessing.
items.zh: 序列建模中的一个核心问题是高效处理包含长程依赖（LRD）的数据。现实世界的时间序列数据通常需要对数万个时间步进行推理，而很少有序列模型能处理数千个时间步。例如，Long Range Arena（LRA）基准[40]的结果表明，当今的序列模型在LRD任务上表现不佳，包括一个所有模型都不比随机猜测更好的任务（Path-X）。

items.capEn: Figure 1: (Left) State Space Models (SSM) parameterized by matrices 𝑨,𝑩,𝑪,𝑫𝑨𝑩𝑪𝑫\bm{A},\bm{B},\bm{C},\bm{D} map an input signal u​(t)𝑢𝑡u(t) to output y​(t)𝑦𝑡y(t) through a latent state x​(t)𝑥𝑡x(t). (Center) Recent theory on continuous-time memorization derives special 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} matrices that allow SSMs to capture LRDs mathematically and empirically. (Right) SSMs can be computed either as a recurrence (left) or convolution (right). However, materializing these conceptual views requires utilizing different representations of its parameters (red, blue, green) which are very expensive to compute. S4 introduces a novel parameterization that efficiently swaps between these representations, allowing it to handle a wide range of tasks, be efficient at both training and inference, and excel at long sequences.
items.capZh: 图1：（左）由矩阵A、B、C、D参数化的状态空间模型（SSM）通过潜在状态x(t)将输入信号u(t)映射到输出y(t)。（中）关于连续时间记忆的最新理论推导出特殊的A矩阵，使SSM能够在数学和实验上捕获LRD。（右）SSM既可以作为循环（左）计算，也可以作为卷积（右）计算。然而，实现这些概念视图需要利用其参数的不同表示（红色、蓝色、绿色），这些表示的计算成本非常高。S4引入了一种新颖的参数化，可以在这些表示之间高效切换，使其能够处理广泛的任务，在训练和推理时都高效，并擅长长序列。

items.en: Since LRDs are perhaps the foremost challenge for sequence models, all standard model families such as continuous-time models (CTMs), RNNs, CNNs, and Transformers include many specialized variants designed to address them. Modern examples include orthogonal and Lipschitz RNNs [1, 13] to combat vanishing gradients, dilated convolutions to increase context size [3, 28], and an increasingly vast family of efficient Transformers that reduce the quadratic dependence on sequence length [22, 8]. Despite being designed for LRDs, these solutions still perform poorly on challenging benchmarks such as LRA [40] or raw audio classification [18].
items.zh: 由于LRD可能是序列模型面临的首要挑战，所有标准模型家族，如连续时间模型（CTM）、RNN、CNN和Transformer，都包含许多专门设计用于解决LRD的变体。现代例子包括用于对抗梯度消失的正交和Lipschitz RNN[1, 13]、用于增加上下文大小的扩张卷积[3, 28]，以及日益庞大的高效Transformer家族，它们减少了对序列长度的二次依赖[22, 8]。尽管这些解决方案是为LRD设计的，但在LRA[40]或原始音频分类[18]等具有挑战性的基准上仍然表现不佳。

items.en: An alternative approach to LRDs was recently introduced based on the state space model (SSM) (Fig. 1). SSMs are a foundational scientific model used in fields such as control theory, computational neuroscience, and many more, but have not been applicable to deep learning for concrete theoretical reasons. In particular, Gu et al. [18] showed that deep SSMs actually struggle even on simple tasks, but can perform exceptionally well when equipped with special state matrices 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} recently derived to solve a problem of continuous-time memorization [45, 16]. Their Linear State Space Layer (LSSL) conceptually unifies the strengths of CTM, RNN and CNN models, and provides a proof of concept that deep SSMs can address LRDs in principle.
items.zh: 最近引入了一种基于状态空间模型（SSM）的LRD替代方法（图1）。SSM是一种基础科学模型，用于控制理论、计算神经科学等领域，但由于具体的理论原因，尚未适用于深度学习。特别是，Gu等人[18]表明，深度SSM即使在简单任务上也表现不佳，但当配备了最近为解决连续时间记忆问题而推导出的特殊状态矩阵A[45, 16]时，可以表现得异常出色。他们的线性状态空间层（LSSL）在概念上统一了CTM、RNN和CNN模型的优势，并提供了深度SSM原则上可以处理LRD的概念验证。

items.en: Unfortunately, the LSSL is infeasible to use in practice because of prohibitive computation and memory requirements induced by the state representation. For state dimension N𝑁N and sequence length L𝐿L, computing the latent state requires O​(N2​L)𝑂superscript𝑁2𝐿O(N^{2}L) operations and O​(N​L)𝑂𝑁𝐿O(NL) space – compared to a Ω​(L+N)Ω𝐿𝑁\Omega(L+N) lower bound for both. Thus for reasonably sized models (e.g. N=256𝑁256N=256 in Gu et al. [18]), the LSSL uses orders of magnitude more memory than comparably-sized RNNs or CNNs. Although theoretically efficient algorithms for the LSSL were proposed, we show that these are numerically unstable. In particular, the special 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} matrix is highly non-normal in the linear algebraic sense, which prevents the application of conventional algorithmic techniques. Consequently, although the LSSL showed that SSMs have strong performance, they are currently computationally impractical as a general sequence modeling solution.
items.zh: 不幸的是，LSSL在实践中不可行，因为状态表示导致了高昂的计算和内存需求。对于状态维度N和序列长度L，计算潜在状态需要O(N²L)次操作和O(NL)空间——而两者的下界都是Ω(L+N)。因此，对于合理大小的模型（例如Gu等人[18]中的N=256），LSSL使用的内存比同等大小的RNN或CNN多几个数量级。尽管提出了LSSL的理论高效算法，但我们表明这些算法在数值上不稳定。特别是，特殊的A矩阵在线性代数意义上是高度非正规的，这阻止了常规算法技术的应用。因此，尽管LSSL表明SSM具有强大的性能，但目前作为通用序列建模解决方案在计算上不可行。

items.en: In this work, we introduce the Structured State Space (S4) sequence model based on the SSM that solves the critical computational bottleneck in previous work. Technically, S4 reparameterizes the structured state matrices 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} appearing in Voelker et al. [45], Gu et al. [16] by decomposing them as the sum of a low-rank and normal term. Additionally, instead of expanding the standard SSM in coefficient space, we compute its truncated generating function in frequency space, which can be simplified into a multipole-like evaluation. Combining these two ideas, we show that the low-rank term can be corrected by the Woodbury identity while the normal term can be diagonalized stably, ultimately reducing to a well-studied and theoretically stable Cauchy kernel [29, 30]. This results in O~​(N+L)~𝑂𝑁𝐿\tilde{O}(N+L) computation and O​(N+L)𝑂𝑁𝐿O(N+L) memory usage, which is essentially tight for sequence models. Compared to the LSSL, S4 is up to 30×30\times faster with 400×400\times less memory usage, while exceeding the LSSL’s performance empirically.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了基于SSM的结构化状态空间（S4）序列模型，解决了先前工作中的关键计算瓶颈。从技术上讲，S4通过将Voelker等人[45]和Gu等人[16]中出现的结构化状态矩阵A分解为低秩项和正规项之和来重新参数化它们。此外，我们不在系数空间中展开标准SSM，而是在频率空间中计算其截断生成函数，这可以简化为多极评估。结合这两个想法，我们表明低秩项可以通过Woodbury恒等式校正，而正规项可以稳定对角化，最终简化为一个经过充分研究且理论上稳定的柯西核[29, 30]。这导致计算复杂度为Õ(N+L)，内存使用为O(N+L)，这对于序列模型来说基本上是紧的。与LSSL相比，S4速度提升高达30倍，内存使用减少400倍，同时在实验上超过了LSSL的性能。

items.en: Empirically, S4 significantly advances the state-of-the-art for LRD. On the LRA benchmark for efficient sequence models, S4 is as fast as all baselines while outperforming them by 20+limit-from2020+ points on average. S4 is the first model to solve the difficult LRA Path-X task (length-163841638416384), achieving 88% accuracy compared to 50% random guessing for all prior work. On speech classification with length-160001600016000 sequences, S4 halves the test error (1.7%percent1.71.7\%) of specialized Speech CNNs – by contrast, all RNN and Transformer baselines fail to learn (≥70%absentpercent70\geq 70\% error).
items.zh: 在实验上，S4显著推进了LRD的最先进水平。在用于高效序列模型的LRA基准上，S4与所有基线一样快，同时平均得分高出20多个点。S4是第一个解决困难的LRA Path-X任务（长度16384）的模型，达到88%的准确率，而所有先前工作的随机猜测准确率为50%。在长度为16000的语音分类任务上，S4将专门语音CNN的测试误差减半（1.7%），而所有RNN和Transformer基线都未能学习（误差≥70%）。

items.en: Beyond LRD, a broad goal of machine learning is to develop a single model that can be used across a wide range of problems. Models today are typically specialized to solve problems from a particular domain (e.g. images, audio, text, time-series), and enable a narrow range of capabilities (e.g. efficient training, fast generation, handling irregularly sampled data). This specialization is typically expressed via domain-specific preprocessing, inductive biases, and architectures. Sequence models provide a general framework for solving many of these problems with reduced specialization – e.g. Vision Transformers for image classification with less 2D information [12]. However, most models such as Transformers generally still require substantial specialization per task to achieve high performance.
items.zh: 除了LRD，机器学习的一个广泛目标是开发一个可以用于广泛问题的单一模型。今天的模型通常专门用于解决特定领域的问题（例如图像、音频、文本、时间序列），并支持狭窄的能力范围（例如高效训练、快速生成、处理不规则采样数据）。这种专门化通常通过特定领域的预处理、归纳偏置和架构来表达。序列模型提供了一个通用框架，可以用更少的专门化来解决许多这些问题——例如，用于图像分类的Vision Transformer使用更少的2D信息[12]。然而，大多数模型（如Transformer）通常仍然需要每个任务的大量专门化才能实现高性能。

items.en: Deep SSMs in particular have conceptual strengths that suggest they may be promising as a general sequence modeling solution. These strengths include a principled approach to handling LRDs, as well as the ability to move between continuous-time, convolutional, and recurrent model representations, each with distinct capabilities (Fig. 1). Our technical contributions enable SSMs to be applied successfully to a varied set of benchmarks with minimal modification:
items.zh: 特别是深度SSM具有概念上的优势，表明它们可能是一种有前途的通用序列建模解决方案。这些优势包括处理LRD的原则性方法，以及在连续时间、卷积和循环模型表示之间移动的能力，每种表示都具有不同的能力（图1）。我们的技术贡献使SSM能够以最小的修改成功应用于各种基准：

items.en: Large-scale generative modeling. On CIFAR-10 density estimation, S4 is competitive with the best autoregressive models (2.852.852.85 bits per dim). On WikiText-103 language modeling, S4 substantially closes the gap to Transformers (within 0.80.80.8 perplexity), setting SoTA for attention-free models.
items.zh: 大规模生成建模。在CIFAR-10密度估计上，S4与最好的自回归模型（每维2.85比特）具有竞争力。在WikiText-103语言建模上，S4大幅缩小了与Transformer的差距（困惑度相差0.8以内），在无注意力模型中达到最先进水平。

items.en: Fast autoregressive generation. Like RNNs, S4 can use its latent state to perform 60×60\times faster pixel/token generation than standard autoregressive models on CIFAR-10 and WikiText-103.
items.zh: 快速自回归生成。与RNN类似，S4可以利用其潜在状态在CIFAR-10和WikiText-103上实现比标准自回归模型快60倍的像素/词元生成。

items.en: Sampling resolution change. Like specialized CTMs, S4 can adapt to changes in time-series sampling frequency without retraining, e.g. at 0.5×0.5\times frequency on speech classification.
items.zh: 采样分辨率变化。像专门的CTM一样，S4可以在不重新训练的情况下适应时间序列采样频率的变化，例如在语音分类中采样频率减半。

items.en: Learning with weaker inductive biases. With no architectural changes, S4 surpasses Speech CNNs on speech classification, outperforms the specialized Informer model on time-series forecasting problems, and matches a 2-D ResNet on sequential CIFAR with over 90%percent9090\% accuracy.
items.zh: 使用较弱归纳偏置的学习。无需架构更改，S4在语音分类上超越了语音CNN，在时间序列预测问题上超越了专门的Informer模型，并在顺序CIFAR上以超过90%的准确率匹配了2D ResNet。

items.en: Sections 2.1, 2.2, 2.4 and 2.3 describe the four properties of SSMs in Fig. 1: the classic continuous-time representation, addressing LRDs with the HiPPO framework, the discrete-time recurrent representation, and the parallelizable convolution representation. In particular, Section 2.4 introduces the SSM convolution kernel 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}}, which is the focus of our theoretical contributions in Section 3.
items.zh: 第2.1、2.2、2.4和2.3节描述了图1中SSM的四个属性：经典的连续时间表示、使用HiPPO框架处理LRD、离散时间循环表示以及可并行化的卷积表示。特别是，第2.4节介绍了SSM卷积核K̅，这是我们在第3节中理论贡献的重点。

full.sec: 2.1 State Space Models: A Continuous-time Latent State Model
full.secZh: 2.1 状态空间模型：连续时间隐状态模型

items.en: The state space model is defined by the simple equation (1). It maps a 1-D input signal u​(t)𝑢𝑡u(t) to an N𝑁N-D latent state x​(t)𝑥𝑡x(t) before projecting to a 1-D output signal y​(t)𝑦𝑡y(t).
items.zh: 状态空间模型由简单的方程（1）定义。它将一维输入信号u(t)映射到N维潜在状态x(t)，然后投影到一维输出信号y(t)。

items.en: SSMs are broadly used in many scientific disciplines and related to latent state models such as Hidden Markov Models (HMM). Our goal is to simply use the SSM as a black-box representation in a deep sequence model, where 𝑨,𝑩,𝑪,𝑫𝑨𝑩𝑪𝑫\bm{A},\bm{B},\bm{C},\bm{D} are parameters learned by gradient descent. For the remainder of this paper, we will omit the parameter 𝑫𝑫\bm{D} for exposition (or equivalently, assume 𝑫=0𝑫0\bm{D}=0) because the term 𝑫​u𝑫𝑢\bm{D}u can be viewed as a skip connection and is easy to compute.
items.zh: SSM广泛应用于许多科学学科，并与隐马尔可夫模型（HMM）等潜在状态模型相关。我们的目标只是将SSM作为深度序列模型中的黑盒表示，其中A、B、C、D是通过梯度下降学习的参数。在本文的其余部分，为了便于说明，我们将省略参数D（或等价地假设D=0），因为项Du可以视为跳跃连接，并且易于计算。

items.en: Prior work found that the basic SSM (1) actually performs very poorly in practice. Intuitively, one explanation is that linear first-order ODEs solve to an exponential function, and thus may suffer from gradients scaling exponentially in the sequence length (i.e., the vanishing/exploding gradients problem [32]). To address this problem, the LSSL leveraged the HiPPO theory of continuous-time memorization [16]. HiPPO specifies a class of certain matrices 𝑨∈ℝN×N𝑨superscriptℝ𝑁𝑁\bm{A}\in\mathbbm{R}^{N\times N} that when incorporated into (1), allows the state x​(t)𝑥𝑡x(t) to memorize the history of the input u​(t)𝑢𝑡u(t). The most important matrix in this class is defined by equation (2), which we will call the HiPPO matrix. For example, the LSSL found that simply modifying an SSM from a random matrix 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} to equation (2) improved its performance on the sequential MNIST benchmark from 60%percent6060\% to 98%percent9898\%.
items.zh: 先前的工作发现，基本的SSM（1）在实践中表现非常差。直观上，一种解释是线性一阶ODE求解为指数函数，因此可能遭受梯度随序列长度呈指数级缩放的问题（即梯度消失/爆炸问题[32]）。为了解决这个问题，LSSL利用了连续时间记忆的HiPPO理论[16]。HiPPO指定了一类特定的矩阵A∈ℝ^{N×N}，当将其纳入（1）时，允许状态x(t)记忆输入u(t)的历史。该类中最重要的矩阵由方程（2）定义，我们称之为HiPPO矩阵。例如，LSSL发现，简单地将SSM从随机矩阵A修改为方程（2），其在顺序MNIST基准上的性能从60%提高到98%。

items.en: To be applied on a discrete input sequence (u0,u1,…)subscript𝑢0subscript𝑢1…(u_{0},u_{1},\dots) instead of continuous function u​(t)𝑢𝑡u(t), (1) must be discretized by a step size ΔΔ\Delta that represents the resolution of the input. Conceptually, the inputs uksubscript𝑢𝑘u_{k} can be viewed as sampling an implicit underlying continuous signal u​(t)𝑢𝑡u(t), where uk=u​(k​Δ)subscript𝑢𝑘𝑢𝑘Δu_{k}=u(k\Delta).
items.zh: 为了应用于离散输入序列(u0, u1, ...)而不是连续函数u(t)，必须通过表示输入分辨率的步长Δ对（1）进行离散化。从概念上讲，输入uk可以视为对隐含的底层连续信号u(t)进行采样，其中uk = u(kΔ)。

items.en: Equation (3) is now a sequence-to-sequence map uk↦ykmaps-tosubscript𝑢𝑘subscript𝑦𝑘u_{k}\mapsto y_{k} instead of function-to-function. Moreover the state equation is now a recurrence in xksubscript𝑥𝑘x_{k}, allowing the discrete SSM to be computed like an RNN. Concretely, xk∈ℝNsubscript𝑥𝑘superscriptℝ𝑁x_{k}\in\mathbbm{R}^{N} can be viewed as a hidden state with transition matrix 𝑨¯bold-¯𝑨\bm{\overline{A}}.
items.zh: 方程 (3) 现在是一个序列到序列的映射 u_k ↦ y_k，而不是函数到函数的映射。此外，状态方程现在是一个关于 x_k 的递推关系，使得离散 SSM 可以像 RNN 一样计算。具体来说，x_k ∈ ℝ^N 可以视为一个隐藏状态，其转移矩阵为 𝑨̄。

items.en: Notationally, throughout this paper we use 𝑨¯,𝑩¯,…bold-¯𝑨bold-¯𝑩…\bm{\overline{A}},\bm{\overline{B}},\dots to denote discretized SSM matrices defined by (3). Note that these matrices are a function of both 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} as well as a step size ΔΔ\Delta; we suppress this dependence for notational convenience when it is clear.
items.zh: 在符号上，本文通篇使用 𝑨̄, 𝑩̄, … 表示由 (3) 定义的离散化 SSM 矩阵。注意这些矩阵既是 𝑨 的函数，也是步长 Δ 的函数；为符号简洁，在含义明确时我们省略这种依赖关系。

items.en: The recurrent SSM (3) is not practical for training on modern hardware due to its sequentiality. Instead, there is a well-known connection between linear time-invariant (LTI) SSMs such as (1) and continuous convolutions. Correspondingly, (3) can actually be written as a discrete convolution.
items.zh: 递推形式的 SSM (3) 由于其顺序性，不适合在现代硬件上进行训练。相反，线性时不变 (LTI) SSM（如 (1)）与连续卷积之间存在众所周知的联系。相应地，(3) 实际上可以写成一个离散卷积。

items.en: This can be vectorized into a convolution (4) with an explicit formula for the convolution kernel (5).
items.zh: 这可以向量化为一个卷积 (4)，并具有卷积核 (5) 的显式公式。

items.en: In other words, equation (4) is a single (non-circular) convolution and can be computed very efficiently with FFTs, provided that 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}} is known. However, computing 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}} in (5) is non-trivial and is the focus of our technical contributions in Section 3. We call 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}} the SSM convolution kernel or filter.
items.zh: 换句话说，方程 (4) 是一个单一（非循环）卷积，只要 𝑲̄ 已知，就可以通过 FFT 非常高效地计算。然而，计算 (5) 中的 𝑲̄ 并非易事，这正是我们在第 3 节中技术贡献的重点。我们将 𝑲̄ 称为 SSM 卷积核或滤波器。

items.en: Our technical results focus on developing the S4 parameterization and showing how to efficiently compute all views of the SSM (Section 2): the continuous representation (𝑨,𝑩,𝑪)𝑨𝑩𝑪(\bm{A},\bm{B},\bm{C}) (1), the recurrent representation (𝑨¯,𝑩¯,𝑪¯)bold-¯𝑨bold-¯𝑩bold-¯𝑪(\bm{\overline{A}},\bm{\overline{B}},\bm{\overline{C}}) (3), and the convolutional representation 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}} (4).
items.zh: 我们的技术成果集中于开发 S4 参数化，并展示如何高效计算 SSM 的所有视角（第 2 节）：连续表示 (𝑨, 𝑩, 𝑪) (1)、递推表示 (𝑨̄, 𝑩̄, 𝑪̄) (3) 和卷积表示 𝑲̄ (4)。

items.en: Section 3.1 motivates our approach, which is based on the linear algebraic concepts of conjugation and diagonalization, and discusses why the naive application of this approach does not work. Section 3.2 gives an overview of the key technical components of our approach and formally defines the S4 parameterization. Section 3.3 sketches the main results, showing that S4 is asymptotically efficient (up to log factors) for sequence models. Proofs are in Appendices B and C.
items.zh: 第 3.1 节阐述了我们的方法动机，该方法基于共轭和对角化的线性代数概念，并讨论了为何直接应用该方法行不通。第 3.2 节概述了我们方法的关键技术组成部分，并正式定义了 S4 参数化。第 3.3 节勾勒了主要结果，表明 S4 对于序列模型是渐近高效的（达到对数因子）。证明见附录 B 和 C。

items.en: The fundamental bottleneck in computing the discrete-time SSM (3) is that it involves repeated matrix multiplication by 𝑨¯bold-¯𝑨\bm{\overline{A}}. For example, computing (5) naively as in the LSSL involves L𝐿L successive multiplications by 𝑨¯bold-¯𝑨\bm{\overline{A}}, requiring O​(N2​L)𝑂superscript𝑁2𝐿O(N^{2}L) operations and O​(N​L)𝑂𝑁𝐿O(NL) space.
items.zh: 计算离散时间 SSM (3) 的根本瓶颈在于它涉及重复的矩阵乘法乘以 𝑨̄。例如，像 LSSL 中那样直接计算 (5) 需要对 𝑨̄ 进行 L 次连续乘法，需要 O(N^2 L) 次运算和 O(N L) 空间。

items.en: To overcome this bottleneck, we use a structural result that allows us to simplify SSMs.
items.zh: 为了克服这一瓶颈，我们利用一个结构性的结果来简化 SSM。

items.en: Conjugation is an equivalence relation on SSMs (𝐀,𝐁,𝐂)∼(𝐕−1​𝐀​𝐕,𝐕−1​𝐁,𝐂​𝐕)similar-to𝐀𝐁𝐂superscript𝐕1𝐀𝐕superscript𝐕1𝐁𝐂𝐕(\bm{A},\bm{B},\bm{C})\sim(\bm{V}^{-1}\bm{A}\bm{V},\bm{V}^{-1}\bm{B},\bm{C}\bm{V}).
items.zh: 共轭是 SSM 上的一个等价关系 (𝐀, 𝐁, 𝐂) ∼ (𝐕^{-1}𝐀𝐕, 𝐕^{-1}𝐁, 𝐂𝐕)。

items.en: Lemma 3.1 motivates putting 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} into a canonical form by conjugation222Note that although we ultimately require 𝑨¯bold-¯𝑨\bm{\overline{A}}, conjugation commutes with discretization so we refer to 𝑨𝑨\bm{A}., which is ideally more structured and allows faster computation. For example, if 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} were diagonal, the resulting computations become much more tractable. In particular, the desired 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}} (equation (4)) would be a Vandermonde product which theoretically only needs O​((N+L)​log2⁡(N+L))𝑂𝑁𝐿superscript2𝑁𝐿O((N+L)\log^{2}(N+L)) arithmetic operations [29].
items.zh: 引理 3.1 启发我们通过共轭²将 𝑨 化为规范形式，理想情况下这种形式更具结构性并允许更快的计算。例如，如果 𝑨 是对角矩阵，那么相关计算将变得容易得多。特别地，所需的 𝑲̄（方程 (4)）将是一个范德蒙德乘积，理论上仅需 O((N+L) log^2(N+L)) 次算术运算 [29]。

items.en: Unfortunately, the naive application of diagonalization does not work due to numerical issues. Werive the explicit diagonalization for the HiPPO matrix (2) and show it has entries exponentially large in the state size N𝑁N, rendering the diagonalization numerically infeasible (e.g. 𝑪​𝑽𝑪𝑽\bm{C}\bm{V} in Lemma 3.1 would not be computable). We note that Gu et al. [18] proposed a different (unimplemented) algorithm to compute 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}} faster than the naive algorithm. In Appendix B, we prove that it is also numerically unstable for related reasons.
items.zh: 不幸的是，由于数值问题，直接应用对角化行不通。我们推导了 HiPPO 矩阵 (2) 的显式对角化，并表明其元素随状态大小 N 呈指数增长，使得对角化在数值上不可行（例如，引理 3.1 中的 𝐂𝐕 无法计算）。我们注意到 Gu 等人 [18] 提出了一种不同的（未实现的）算法来比朴素算法更快地计算 𝑲̄。在附录 B 中，我们证明该算法由于类似原因也存在数值不稳定性。

items.en: The HiPPO matrix 𝐀𝐀\bm{A} in equation (2) is diagonalized by the matrix 𝐕i​j=(i+ji−j)subscript𝐕𝑖𝑗binomial𝑖𝑗𝑖𝑗\bm{V}_{ij}=\binom{i+j}{i-j}. In particular, 𝐕3​i,i=(4​i2​i)≈24​isubscript𝐕3𝑖𝑖binomial4𝑖2𝑖superscript24𝑖\bm{V}_{3i,i}=\binom{4i}{2i}\approx 2^{4i}. Therefore 𝐕𝐕\bm{V} has entries of magnitude up to 24​N/3superscript24𝑁32^{4N/3}.
items.zh: 方程 (2) 中的 HiPPO 矩阵 𝐀 由矩阵 𝐕_{ij} = \binom{i+j}{i-j} 对角化。特别地，𝐕_{3i,i} = \binom{4i}{2i} ≈ 2^{4i}。因此 𝐕 的元素大小可达 2^{4N/3}。

full.sec: 3.2 The S4 Parameterization: Normal Plus Low-Rank

items.en: The previous discussion implies that we should only conjugate by well-conditioned matrices 𝑽𝑽\bm{V}. The ideal scenario is when the matrix 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} is diagonalizable by a perfectly conditioned (i.e., unitary) matrix. By the Spectral Theorem of linear algebra, this is exactly the class of normal matrices. However, this class of matrices is restrictive; in particular, it does not contain the HiPPO matrix (2).
items.zh: 前面的讨论表明，我们只应使用条件良好的矩阵 𝐕 进行共轭。理想情况是矩阵 𝑨 可由条件完美（即酉）矩阵对角化。根据线性代数的谱定理，这正是正规矩阵的类别。然而，这类矩阵具有限制性；特别地，它不包含 HiPPO 矩阵 (2)。

items.en: We make the observation that although the HiPPO matrix is not normal, it can be decomposed as the sum of a normal and low-rank matrix. However, this is still not useful by itself: unlike a diagonal matrix, powering up this sum (in (5)) is still slow and not easily optimized. We overcome this bottleneck by simultaneously applying three new techniques.
items.zh: 我们观察到，尽管 HiPPO 矩阵不是正规矩阵，但它可以分解为一个正规矩阵和一个低秩矩阵的和。然而，这本身仍然没有用：与对角矩阵不同，对这个和进行幂运算（在 (5) 中）仍然很慢且不易优化。我们通过同时应用三种新技术来克服这一瓶颈。

items.en: Instead of computing 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}} directly, we compute its spectrum by evaluating its truncated generating function ∑j=0L−1𝑲¯j​ζjsuperscriptsubscript𝑗0𝐿1subscriptbold-¯𝑲𝑗superscript𝜁𝑗\sum_{j=0}^{L-1}\bm{\overline{K}}_{j}\zeta^{j} at the roots of unity ζ𝜁\zeta. 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}} can then be found by applying an inverse FFT.
items.zh: 我们不直接计算 𝑲̄，而是通过计算其在单位根 ζ 处的截断生成函数 ∑_{j=0}^{L-1} 𝑲̄_j ζ^j 来获得其频谱。然后可以通过应用逆 FFT 得到 𝑲̄。

items.en: This generating function is closely related to the matrix resolvent, and now involves a matrix inverse instead of power. The low-rank term can now be corrected by applying the Woodbury identity which reduces (𝑨+𝑷​𝑸∗)−1superscript𝑨𝑷superscript𝑸1(\bm{A}+\bm{P}\bm{Q}^{*})^{-1} in terms of 𝑨−1superscript𝑨1\bm{A}^{-1}, truly reducing to the diagonal case.
items.zh: 这个生成函数与矩阵预解式密切相关，现在涉及矩阵求逆而非幂运算。低秩项现在可以通过应用 Woodbury 恒等式来修正，该恒等式将 (𝑨 + 𝑷𝑸^*)^{-1} 用 𝑨^{-1} 表示，真正简化为对角情况。

items.en: Finally, we show that the diagonal matrix case is equivalent to the computation of a Cauchy kernel 1ωj−ζk1subscript𝜔𝑗subscript𝜁𝑘\frac{1}{\omega_{j}-\zeta_{k}}, a well-studied problem with stable near-linear algorithms [31, 30].
items.zh: 最后，我们证明对角矩阵情形等价于计算柯西核 1/(ω_j - ζ_k)，这是一个已有稳定近线性算法[31, 30]的经典问题。

items.en: Our techniques apply to any matrix that can be decomposed as Normal Plus Low-Rank (NPLR).
items.zh: 我们的技术适用于任何可分解为正规加低秩（NPLR）的矩阵。

items.en: All HiPPO matrices from [16] have a NPLR representation
items.zh: 所有来自[16]的HiPPO矩阵都具有NPLR表示。

items.en: for unitary 𝐕∈ℂN×N𝐕superscriptℂ𝑁𝑁\bm{V}\in\mathbbm{C}^{N\times N}, diagonal 𝚲𝚲\bm{\Lambda}, and low-rank factorization 𝐏,𝐐∈ℝN×r𝐏𝐐superscriptℝ𝑁𝑟\bm{P},\bm{Q}\in\mathbbm{R}^{N\times r}. These matrices HiPPO- LegS, LegT, LagT all satisfy r=1𝑟1r=1 or r=2𝑟2r=2. In particular, equation (2) is NPLR with r=1𝑟1r=1.
items.zh: 对于酉矩阵 V ∈ ℂ^{N×N}、对角矩阵 Λ 和低秩分解 P, Q ∈ ℝ^{N×r}，这些矩阵 HiPPO-LegS、LegT、LagT 均满足 r=1 或 r=2。特别地，方程(2)是 r=1 的NPLR。

items.en: By equation (6), note that NPLR matrices can be conjugated into diagonal plus low-rank (DPLR) form (now over ℂℂ\mathbbm{C} instead of ℝℝ\mathbbm{R}). Theorems 2 and 3 describe the complexities of SSMs where 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} is in DPLR form. S4 is optimal or near-optimal for both recurrent and convolutional representations.
items.zh: 由方程(6)可知，NPLR矩阵可共轭为对角加低秩（DPLR）形式（此时在 ℂ 上而非 ℝ 上）。定理2和3描述了当 A 为DPLR形式时SSM的复杂度。S4在递归和卷积表示上均达到最优或近最优。

items.en: Given any step size ΔΔ\Delta, computing one step of the recurrence (3) can be done in O​(N)𝑂𝑁O(N) operations where N𝑁N is the state size.
items.zh: 给定任意步长 Δ，计算递归(3)的一步可在 O(N) 次操作内完成，其中 N 是状态大小。

items.en: Theorem 2 follows from the fact that the inverse of a DPLR matrix is also DPLR (e.g. also by the Woodbury identity). This implies that the discretized matrix 𝑨¯bold-¯𝑨\bm{\overline{A}} is the product of two DPLR matrices and thus has O​(N)𝑂𝑁O(N) matrix-vector multiplication. Section C.2 computes 𝑨¯bold-¯𝑨\bm{\overline{A}} in closed DPLR form.
items.zh: 定理2源于DPLR矩阵的逆也是DPLR（例如由Woodbury恒等式）。这意味着离散化矩阵 Ā 是两个DPLR矩阵的乘积，因此具有 O(N) 的矩阵-向量乘法。附录C.2以闭式DPLR形式计算了 Ā。

items.en: Given any step size ΔΔ\Delta, computing the SSM convolution filter 𝐊¯bold-¯𝐊\bm{\overline{K}} can be reduced to 4 Cauchy multiplies, requiring only O~​(N+L)~𝑂𝑁𝐿\widetilde{O}(N+L) operations and O​(N+L)𝑂𝑁𝐿O(N+L) space.
items.zh: 给定任意步长 Δ，计算SSM卷积滤波器 K̄ 可简化为4次柯西乘法，仅需 Õ(N+L) 次操作和 O(N+L) 空间。

items.en: Appendix C, Definition 3 formally defines Cauchy matrices, which are related to rational interpolation problems. Computing with Cauchy matrices is an extremely well-studied problem in numerical analysis, with both fast arithmetic and numerical algorithms based on the famous Fast Multipole Method (FMM) [29, 31, 30]. The computational complexities of these algorithms under various settings are described in Appendix C, Proposition 5.
items.zh: 附录C定义3正式定义了柯西矩阵，其与有理插值问题相关。柯西矩阵计算是数值分析中研究极为深入的问题，既有快速算术算法，也有基于著名快速多极方法（FMM）[29, 31, 30]的数值算法。这些算法在不同设置下的计算复杂度见附录C命题5。

items.en: We reiterate that Theorem 3 is our core technical contribution, and its algorithm is the very motivation of the NPLR S4 parameterization. This algorithm is formally sketched in Algorithm 1.
items.zh: 我们重申，定理3是我们的核心技术贡献，其算法正是NPLR S4参数化的动机。该算法在算法1中正式给出。

full.sec: 3.4 Architecture Details of the Deep S4 Layer

items.en: Concretely, an S4 layer is parameterized as follows. First initialize a SSM with 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} set to the HiPPO matrix (2). By Lemma 3.1 and Theorem 1, this SSM is unitarily equivalent to some (𝚲−𝑷​𝑸∗,𝑩,𝑪)𝚲𝑷superscript𝑸𝑩𝑪(\bm{\Lambda}-\bm{P}\bm{Q}^{*},\bm{B},\bm{C}) for some diagonal 𝚲𝚲\bm{\Lambda} and vectors 𝑷,𝑸,𝑩,𝑪∈ℂN×1𝑷𝑸𝑩𝑪superscriptℂ𝑁1\bm{P},\bm{Q},\bm{B},\bm{C}\in\mathbbm{C}^{N\times 1}. These comprise S4’s 5​N5𝑁5N trainable parameters.
items.zh: 具体而言，S4层参数化如下。首先初始化一个SSM，其中 A 设为HiPPO矩阵(2)。由引理3.1和定理1，该SSM酉等价于某个 (Λ - PQ^*, B, C)，其中 Λ 为对角矩阵，向量 P, Q, B, C ∈ ℂ^{N×1}。这些构成了S4的 5N 个可训练参数。

items.en: The overall deep neural network (DNN) architecture of S4 is similar to prior work. As defined above, S4 defines a map from ℝL→ℝL→superscriptℝ𝐿superscriptℝ𝐿\mathbbm{R}^{L}\to\mathbbm{R}^{L}, i.e. a 1-D sequence map. Typically, DNNs operate on feature maps of size H𝐻H instead of 111. S4 handles multiple features by simply defining H𝐻H independent copies of itself, and then mixing the H𝐻H features with a position-wise linear layer for a total of O​(H2)+O​(H​N)𝑂superscript𝐻2𝑂𝐻𝑁O(H^{2})+O(HN) parameters per layer. Nonlinear activation functions are also inserted between these layers. Overall, S4 defines a sequence-to-sequence map of shape (batch size, sequence length, hidden dimension), exactly the same as related sequence models such as Transformers, RNNs, and CNNs.
items.zh: S4的整体深度神经网络（DNN）架构与先前工作类似。如上定义，S4定义了从 ℝ^L 到 ℝ^L 的映射，即一维序列映射。通常，DNN处理大小为 H 的特征图而非1。S4通过定义 H 个独立副本处理多特征，然后通过位置线性层混合 H 个特征，每层参数总量为 O(H^2) + O(HN)。非线性激活函数也插入在这些层之间。总体而言，S4定义了形状为（批大小，序列长度，隐藏维度）的序列到序列映射，与Transformer、RNN和CNN等相关序列模型完全相同。

items.en: Note that the core S4 module is a linear transformation, but the addition of non-linear transformations through the depth of the network makes the overall deep SSM non-linear. This is analogous to a vanilla CNN, since convolutional layers are also linear. The broadcasting across H𝐻H hidden features described in this section is also analogous to depthwise-separable convolutions. Thus, the overall deep S4 model is closely related to a depthwise-separable CNN but with global convolution kernels.
items.zh: 注意，核心S4模块是线性变换，但通过网络深度添加非线性变换使整体深度SSM成为非线性。这类似于普通CNN，因为卷积层也是线性的。本节描述的跨 H 个隐藏特征的广播也类似于深度可分离卷积。因此，整体深度S4模型与具有全局卷积核的深度可分离CNN密切相关。

items.en: Finally, we note that follow-up work found that this version of S4 can sometimes suffer from numerical instabilities when the 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} matrix has eigenvalues on the right half-plane [14]. It introduced a slight change to the NPLR parameterization for S4 from 𝚲−𝑷​𝑸∗𝚲𝑷superscript𝑸\bm{\Lambda}-\bm{P}\bm{Q}^{*} to 𝚲−𝑷​𝑷∗𝚲𝑷superscript𝑷\bm{\Lambda}-\bm{P}\bm{P}^{*} that corrects this potential problem.
items.zh: 最后，我们注意到后续工作发现，当 A 矩阵的特征值位于右半平面时，此版本的S4有时会出现数值不稳定性[14]。该工作对S4的NPLR参数化进行了微小改动，从 Λ - PQ^* 改为 Λ - PP^*，以纠正这一潜在问题。

items.en: Section 4.1 benchmarks S4 against the LSSL and efficient Transformer models. Section 4.2 validates S4 on LRDs: the LRA benchmark and raw speech classification. Section 4.3 investigates whether S4 can be used as a general sequence model to perform effectively and efficiently in a wide variety of settings including image classification, image and text generation, and time series forecasting.
items.zh: 第4.1节将S4与LSSL和高效Transformer模型进行基准测试。第4.2节在LRD上验证S4：LRA基准和原始语音分类。第4.3节研究S4是否可作为通用序列模型，在图像分类、图像和文本生成以及时间序列预测等多种设置中高效运行。

items.en: We benchmark that S4 can be trained quickly and efficiently, both compared to the LSSL, as well as efficient Transformer variants designed for long-range sequence modeling. As outlined in Section 3, S4 is theoretically much more efficient than the LSSL, and Fig. 3 confirms that the S4 is orders of magnitude more speed- and memory-efficient for practical layer sizes. In fact, S4’s speed and memory use is competitive with the most efficient Transformer variants benchmarked by Tay et al. [40]—Linear Transformer [22] and Performer [8]—in a parameter-matched setting (Fig. 3, following the protocol of Tay et al. [40]).
items.zh: 我们基准测试表明，S4可以快速高效地训练，无论是与LSSL相比，还是与为长序列建模设计的高效Transformer变体相比。如第3节所述，S4在理论上比LSSL高效得多，图3证实S4在实际层大小上在速度和内存效率方面高出数个数量级。事实上，S4的速度和内存使用与Tay等人[40]基准测试的最高效Transformer变体——Linear Transformer [22]和Performer [8]——在参数匹配设置下具有竞争力（图3，遵循Tay等人[40]的协议）。

items.en: As described in Sections 2.2 and 3.1, S4 uses a principled approach to address LRDs based on the HiPPO theory of continuous-time memorization. Our goal in this section is to validate that S4 achieves high performance on difficult tasks that require long-range reasoning. We focus here on two problems: (i) the Long-Range Arena, a well-known benchmark designed to test efficient sequence models on LRDs, and (ii) a speech classification problem as a real-world test of LRDs.
items.zh: 如第2.2节和第3.1节所述，S4基于连续时间记忆的HiPPO理论，采用原则性方法处理LRD。本节的目标是验证S4在需要长距离推理的困难任务上实现高性能。我们重点关注两个问题：(i) 长距离竞技场（Long-Range Arena），一个旨在测试高效序列模型在LRD上性能的知名基准；(ii) 语音分类问题，作为LRD的现实世界测试。

items.en: Long Range Arena (LRA). LRA [40] contains 666 tasks with lengths 1K-16K steps, encompassing modalities and objectives that require similarity, structural, and visuospatial reasoning. Table 2 compares S4 against the 11 Transformer variants from Tay et al. [40] as well as follow-up work. S4 substantially advances the SoTA, outperforming all baselines on all tasks and averaging 80.48%percent80.4880.48\% compared to less than 60%percent6060\% for every baseline. Notably, S4 solves the Path-X task, an extremely challenging task that involves reasoning about LRDs over sequences of length 128×128=1638412812816384128\times 128=16384. All previous models have failed (i.e. random guessing) due to memory or computation bottlenecks, or simply being unable to learn such long dependencies.
items.zh: 长距离竞技场（LRA）。LRA [40]包含6个任务，长度从1K到16K步，涵盖需要相似性、结构和视觉空间推理的模态和目标。表2将S4与Tay等人[40]的11个Transformer变体以及后续工作进行比较。S4大幅推进了SoTA，在所有任务上优于所有基线，平均准确率80.48%，而每个基线均低于60%。值得注意的是，S4解决了Path-X任务，这是一个极具挑战性的任务，涉及对长度为128×128=16384的序列进行长距离推理。所有先前模型均因内存或计算瓶颈，或根本无法学习如此长的依赖而失败（即随机猜测）。

items.en: We analyze S4’s performance on Path-X by visualizing its learned representations, in particular 1-D convolution kernels 𝑲¯bold-¯𝑲\bm{\overline{K}} which are the focus of our technical results in Section 3. Fig. 4 shows that S4 learns a variety of filters that display spatially consistent structure and demonstrate awareness of the 2-D nature of the data. In particular, the lower layers learn simple kernels that extract features from just a few rows of local context while ignoring the rest of the image. On the other hand, higher layers aggregate information globally across full columns of the image at varying spatial frequencies. Filters in these higher layers span the entire context (163841638416384 pixels), confirming S4’s ability to learn LRDs.
items.zh: 我们通过可视化S4学到的表示，特别是1维卷积核𝑲̅（这是我们在第3节中技术结果的焦点），来分析其在Path-X上的性能。图4显示S4学到了多种滤波器，这些滤波器展现出空间一致的结构，并表明其对数据2维性质的认识。具体来说，较低层学习简单的核，仅从局部上下文的几行中提取特征，而忽略图像的其余部分。另一方面，较高层以不同的空间频率在图像的完整列上全局聚合信息。这些较高层中的滤波器跨越整个上下文（16384像素），证实了S4学习长程依赖的能力。

items.en: Raw Speech Classification. Speech is a typical real-world time series domain, involving signals sampled from an underlying physical process at high frequency. We perform speech classification using the SC10 subset of the Speech Commands dataset [47] (see Section D.5). While most sequence models for speech rely on extensive preprocessing (e.g. to MFCC features), we classify raw speech (length-160001600016000) following Romero et al. [35]. S4 achieves 98.3%percent98.398.3\% accuracy, higher than all baselines that use the 100×100\times shorter MFCC features, and validates that a powerful LRD model is able to extract more information from the raw data and outperform hand-crafted pre-processing. Additionally, we include a baseline CNN specifically designed for raw speech, the discriminator from the WaveGAN model [11], which performs worse than S4 while having 90×90\times more parameters and incorporating many more architectural heuristics (Section D.2).
items.zh: 原始语音分类。语音是典型的真实世界时间序列领域，涉及从底层物理过程以高频采样的信号。我们使用语音命令数据集[47]的SC10子集进行语音分类（见第D.5节）。虽然大多数用于语音的序列模型依赖大量预处理（例如MFCC特征），但我们遵循Romero等人[35]的方法对原始语音（长度16000）进行分类。S4达到了98.3%的准确率，高于所有使用短100倍的MFCC特征的基线，验证了强大的长程依赖模型能够从原始数据中提取更多信息，并超越手工设计的预处理。此外，我们加入了一个专门为原始语音设计的基线CNN，即WaveGAN模型[11]的判别器，其性能不如S4，但参数数量多90倍，并包含更多架构启发式方法（第D.2节）。

full.sec: 4.3 S4 as a General Sequence Model

items.en: A key goal of sequence modeling research is to develop a single model that can be applied in many domains (e.g. images, audio, text, time-series) with a broad range of capabilities (e.g. efficient training, fast generation, handling irregularly sampled data). As a fundamental scientific model, SSMs are a promising candidate that come with a range of capabilities, and S4’s strong results on LRD benchmarks spanning images, text, and speech are evidence of S4’s potential as a general sequence model. In this section, we focus on understanding this question in more depth by highlighting key strengths of S4 in settings that usually require specialized models. The tasks we focus on (generative modeling, image classification, time-series forecasting) are considered as LRD tasks in the literature, and serve as additional validation that S4 handles LRDs efficiently.
items.zh: 序列建模研究的一个关键目标是开发一个单一模型，能够应用于多个领域（如图像、音频、文本、时间序列），并具有广泛的能力（如高效训练、快速生成、处理不规则采样数据）。作为一个基础科学模型，状态空间模型是一个有前景的候选者，具备一系列能力，而S4在涵盖图像、文本和语音的长程依赖基准上的强劲结果，证明了S4作为通用序列模型的潜力。在本节中，我们通过突出S4在通常需要专门模型的场景中的关键优势，更深入地理解这一问题。我们关注的任务（生成建模、图像分类、时间序列预测）在文献中被视为长程依赖任务，并作为S4高效处理长程依赖的额外验证。

items.en: Large-scale generative modeling. We investigate two well-studied image and text benchmarks to validate the scalability, flexibility, and efficiency of S4. These tasks require much larger models than our previous tasks – up to 250250250M parameters.
items.zh: 大规模生成建模。我们研究两个经过充分研究的图像和文本基准，以验证S4的可扩展性、灵活性和效率。这些任务需要比之前任务大得多的模型——最多2.5亿参数。

items.en: First, CIFAR density estimation is a popular benchmark for autoregressive models, where images are flattened into a sequence of 307230723072 RGB subpixels that are predicted one by one. Fig. 8 shows that with no 2D inductive bias, S4 is competitive with the best models designed for this task.
items.zh: 首先，CIFAR密度估计是自回归模型的一个流行基准，其中图像被展平为3072个RGB子像素的序列，并逐个预测。图8显示，在没有2维归纳偏置的情况下，S4与为此任务设计的最佳模型具有竞争力。

items.en: Second, WikiText-103 is an established benchmark for language modeling, an important task for large-scale sequence models where tokens are predicted sequentially based on past context. Although RNNs were the model of choice for many years, Transformers are now the dominant model in such applications that contain data that is inherently discrete. We show that alternative models to Transformers can still be competitive in these settings. By simply taking a strong Transformer baseline [2] and replacing the self-attention layers, S4 substantially closes the gap to Transformers (within 0.80.80.8 ppl), setting SoTA for attention-free models by over 222 ppl.
items.zh: 其次，WikiText-103是语言建模的既定基准，这是大规模序列模型的重要任务，其中标记基于过去上下文顺序预测。尽管RNN多年来一直是首选模型，但Transformer现在在包含本质离散数据的此类应用中占据主导地位。我们表明，Transformer的替代模型在这些设置中仍然可以具有竞争力。通过简单地采用强Transformer基线[2]并替换自注意力层，S4大幅缩小了与Transformer的差距（在0.8困惑度以内），在无注意力模型上以超过2困惑度创下新纪录。

items.en: Fast autoregressive inference. A prominent limitation of autoregressive models is inference speed (e.g. generation), since they require a pass over the full context for every new sample. Several methods have been specifically crafted to overcome this limitation such as the Linear Transformer, a hybrid Transformer/RNN that switches to a stateful, recurrent view at inference time for speed.
items.zh: 快速自回归推理。自回归模型的一个显著限制是推理速度（例如生成），因为它们需要对每个新样本遍历整个上下文。已经专门设计了多种方法来克服这一限制，例如线性Transformer，这是一种混合Transformer/RNN，在推理时切换到有状态的循环视图以提高速度。

items.en: As a stateful model, SSMs automatically have this ability (Fig. 1). By switching to its recurrent representation (Section 2.3), S4 requires constant memory and computation per time step – in contrast to standard autoregressive models which scale in the context length. On both CIFAR-10 and WikiText-103, we report the throughput of various models at generation time, with S4 around 60×60\times faster than a vanilla Transformer on both tasks (details in Section D.3.3).
items.zh: 作为一个有状态模型，状态空间模型自动具备这种能力（图1）。通过切换到其循环表示（第2.3节），S4每个时间步需要恒定的内存和计算——与标准自回归模型随上下文长度扩展形成对比。在CIFAR-10和WikiText-103上，我们报告了各种模型在生成时的吞吐量，S4在两个任务上都比普通Transformer快约60倍（详情见第D.3.3节）。

items.en: Sampling resolution change. As a continuous-time model, S4 automatically adapts to data sampled at different rates, a challenging setting for time series with a dedicated line of work [37, 10, 35]. Without re-training, S4 achieves 96.3%percent96.396.3\% accuracy at 0.5×0.5\times the frequency on Speech Commands 10 (Fig. 6), simply by changing its internal step size ΔΔ\Delta (Section 2.3).
items.zh: 采样率变化。作为一个连续时间模型，S4自动适应以不同速率采样的数据，这是时间序列中具有专门研究方向的挑战性设置[37, 10, 35]。无需重新训练，S4仅通过改变其内部步长Δ（第2.3节），在语音命令10上以0.5倍频率达到96.3%的准确率（图6）。

items.en: Learning with weaker inductive bias. Beyond our results on speech (Section 4.2), we further validate that S4 can be applied with minimal modifications on two domains that typically require specialized domain-specific preprocessing and architectures. First, we compare S4 to the Informer [50], a new Transformer architecture that uses a complex encoder-decoder designed for time-series forecasting problems. A simple application of S4 that treats forecasting as a masked sequence-to-sequence transformation (Fig. 11) outperforms the Informer and other baselines on 40/50405040/50 settings across 555 forecasting tasks. Notably, S4 is better on the longest setting in each task, e.g. reducing MSE by 37%percent3737\% when forecasting 303030 days of weather data (Table 3).
items.zh: 使用较弱归纳偏置的学习。除了我们在语音上的结果（第4.2节），我们进一步验证S4可以在两个通常需要专门领域特定预处理和架构的领域中以最小修改应用。首先，我们将S4与Informer [50]进行比较，这是一种新的Transformer架构，使用为时间序列预测问题设计的复杂编码器-解码器。将预测视为掩码序列到序列转换的S4简单应用（图11）在5个预测任务的40/50设置中优于Informer和其他基线。值得注意的是，S4在每个任务的最长设置上表现更好，例如在预测30天天气数据时，均方误差降低了37%（表3）。

items.en: Finally, we evaluate S4 on pixel-level sequential image classification tasks (Fig. 6), popular benchmarks which were originally LRD tests for RNNs [1]. Beyond LRDs, these benchmarks point to a recent effort of the ML community to solve vision problems with reduced domain knowledge, in the spirit of models such as Vision Transformers [12] and MLP-Mixer [41] which involve patch-based models that without 2-D inductive bias. Sequential CIFAR is a particularly challenging dataset where outside of SSMs, all sequence models have a gap of over 25%percent2525\% to a simple 2-D CNN. By contrast, S4 is competitive with a larger ResNet18 (7.9M vs. 11.0M parameters), both with (93.16% vs. 95.62%) or without (91.12% vs. 89.46%) data augmentation. Moreover, it is much more robust to other architectural choices (e.g. 90.46% vs. 79.52% when swapping BatchNorm for LayerNorm).
items.zh: 最后，我们在像素级顺序图像分类任务（图6）上评估S4，这些是流行的基准，最初是RNN的长程依赖测试[1]。除了长程依赖，这些基准指向机器学习社区最近在减少领域知识解决视觉问题方面的努力，类似于视觉Transformer [12]和MLP-Mixer [41]等模型，这些模型基于补丁且没有2维归纳偏置。顺序CIFAR是一个特别具有挑战性的数据集，除了状态空间模型外，所有序列模型与简单2维CNN的差距超过25%。相比之下，S4与更大的ResNet18（7.9M vs. 11.0M参数）具有竞争力，无论是否有数据增强（93.16% vs. 95.62%和91.12% vs. 89.46%）。此外，它对其他架构选择更加鲁棒（例如，将批归一化替换为层归一化时，90.46% vs. 79.52%）。

full.sec: 4.4 SSM Ablations: the Importance of HiPPO

items.en: A critical motivation of S4 was the use of the HiPPO matrices to initialize an SSM. We consider several simplifications of S4 to ablate the importance of each of these components, including: (i) how important is the HiPPO initialization? (ii) how important is training the SSM on top of HiPPO? (iii) are the benefits of S4 captured by the NPLR parameterization without HiPPO?
items.zh: S4的一个关键动机是使用HiPPO矩阵初始化状态空间模型。我们考虑S4的几种简化，以消融每个组件的重要性，包括：(i) HiPPO初始化有多重要？(ii) 在HiPPO基础上训练状态空间模型有多重要？(iii) S4的优势是否可以在没有HiPPO的情况下通过NPLR参数化捕获？

items.en: As a simple testbed, all experiments in this section were performed on the sequential CIFAR-10 task, whicih we found transferred well to other settings. Models were constrained to at most 100K trainable parameters and trained with a simple plateau learning rate scheduler and no regularization.
items.zh: 作为一个简单的测试平台，本节所有实验均在顺序CIFAR-10任务上进行，我们发现该任务能很好地迁移到其他设置。模型被限制为最多10万个可训练参数，并使用简单的平台学习率调度器训练，无正则化。

items.en: We first investigate generic SSMs with various initializations. We consider a random Gaussian initialization (with variance scaled down until it did not NaN), and the HiPPO initialization. We also consider a random diagonal Gaussian matrix as a potential structured method; parameterizing 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} as a diagonal matrix would allow substantial speedups without going through the complexity of S4’s NPLR parameterization. We consider both freezing the 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} matrix and training it.
items.zh: 我们首先研究具有各种初始化的通用状态空间模型。我们考虑随机高斯初始化（方差缩小直到不出现NaN）和HiPPO初始化。我们还考虑随机对角高斯矩阵作为一种潜在的结构化方法；将𝑨参数化为对角矩阵可以大幅加速，而无需经历S4的NPLR参数化的复杂性。我们考虑冻结𝑨矩阵和训练它两种情况。

items.en: Fig. 9 shows both training and validation curves, from which we can make several observations. First, training the SSM improved all methods, particularly the randomly initialized ones. For all methods, training the SSM led to improvements in both training and validation curves.
items.zh: 图9显示了训练和验证曲线，从中我们可以得出几个观察结果。首先，训练状态空间模型改进了所有方法，特别是随机初始化的方法。对于所有方法，训练状态空间模型导致训练和验证曲线都有改进。

items.en: Second, a large generalization gap exists between the initializations. In particular, note that when 𝑨𝑨\bm{A} is trained, all initializations are able to reach perfect training accuracy. However, their validation accuracies are separated by over 15%percent1515\%.
items.zh: 其次，初始化之间存在巨大的泛化差距。特别地，注意当训练𝑨时，所有初始化都能达到完美的训练准确率。然而，它们的验证准确率相差超过15%。

items.en: The previous experiment validates the importance of HiPPO in SSMs. This was the main motivation of the NPLR algorithm in S4, which utilizes structure of the HiPPO matrix (2) to make SSMs computationally feasible. Fig. 10(a) shows that random NPLR matrices still do not perform well, which validates that S4’s effectiveness primarily comes from the HiPPO initialization, not the NPLR parameterization.
items.zh: 之前的实验验证了HiPPO在状态空间模型中的重要性。这是S4中NPLR算法的主要动机，该算法利用HiPPO矩阵（2）的结构使状态空间模型在计算上可行。图10(a)显示随机NPLR矩阵仍然表现不佳，这验证了S4的有效性主要来自HiPPO初始化，而不是NPLR参数化。

items.en: Finally, Fig. 10(b) considers the main ablations considered in this section (with trainable SSMs) and adds minor regularization. With 0.1 Dropout, the same trends still hold, and the HiPPO initialization—in other words, the full S4 method—achieves 84.27%percent84.2784.27\% test accuracy with just 100K parameters.
items.zh: 最后，图10(b)考虑了本节中的主要消融实验（使用可训练的SSM），并添加了轻微的正则化。在0.1 Dropout下，相同的趋势仍然成立，而HiPPO初始化——即完整的S4方法——仅用10万个参数就达到了84.27%的测试准确率。

items.en: We introduce S4, a sequence model that uses a new parameterization for the state space model’s continuous-time, recurrent, and convolutional views to efficiently model LRDs in a principled manner. Results across established benchmarks evaluating a diverse range of data modalities and model capabilities suggest that S4 has the potential to be an effective general sequence modeling solution.
items.zh: 我们引入了S4，这是一种序列模型，它使用状态空间模型连续时间、循环和卷积视图的新参数化，以原则性的方式高效建模LRD。在评估不同数据模态和模型能力的既定基准上的结果表明，S4有潜力成为一种有效的通用序列建模解决方案。
